meaning: [军] Military Agency for Standardization,军事防护勤务
examples: The MAS is the speed of the last level.
When you run at MAS, you reach your maximum heart rate.
Le Mas Perreal is an idyllic place for lovers of solitude, lovely hilltop villages and fine dining.
Ultimately, Sinar Mas were accused of indulging in illegal deforestation that was pushing orangutans to extinction.
